Solana (SOL) token holders reached an all-time high of 166.9-167 million in April 2026, up 12% since October, making it the fourth-most held Layer 1 token behind BNB, ETH, and TRX[6]. signals.headline: Bitcoin Holds Above $71K Post-US-Iran Ceasefire | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Holds Above $71K Post-US-Iran Ceasefire | YES | MED confidence**  
A US-Iran ceasefire boosted sentiment, driving Bitcoin to $71K-$73K with 4% gains and steadying above $71K amid profit booking and Middle East tensions[5][7]. Retail accumulated 4.3M BTC in one week, supporting resilience near key supports like $70,700 EMA[1][5].
